style_description: Néo-brutalisme coloré + Glassmorphism + dégradés sombres. A highly fluid, animation-heavy dark mode fintech application. Built with high-contrast neo-brutalist borders on top of deep, frosted glassmorphic panels. Designed as a mobile-first web app mimicking a premium 2026 React Native Expo aesthetic.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6 to p-8 for mobile cards. Screens must have pb-24 to accommodate bottom tab navigation.
layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-screen overflow-hidden bg-black relative
layout.grid_system: Use 1-column mobile-first flex/grid layouts. Dense control-room style for admin dashboard (grid-cols-2 to grid-cols-4).

surfaces_and_components.glassmorphic_card: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
surfaces_and_components.neo_brutalist_card: bg-[#111] border-2 border-white/20 rounded-2xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,255,255,0.5)] p-6 transition-all

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FFFF] text-black font-bold border-2 border-[#00FFFF] hover:bg-transparent hover:text-[#00FFFF] hover:shadow-[inset_0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,255,0.5)] transition-all rounded-full px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border-2 border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 rounded-full px-8 py-4

surfaces_and_components.inputs: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border-b-2 border-white/20 focus:border-[#00FFFF] text-white rounded-none px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-colors
surfaces_and_components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-3xl border-t border-white/10 pb-safe pt-4 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50
surfaces_and_components.charts: Recharts with transparent backgrounds, glowing strokes (#00FFFF and #FF007F), and customized glassmorphic tooltips.

animations.rules: ULTRA FLUID. Framer Motion must wrap every route and interactive element.

media.icons: lucide-react for standard icons, @phosphor-icons/react for duotone rich icons.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure glowing text passes APCA/WCAG ratios. Use text-shadow for glowing elements.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, list items) in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first web app mimicking a React Native app. Constrain the main view to a mobile aspect ratio on desktop (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto) or build a fully responsive fluid UI that feels like an app.
Implement pure CSS radial gradients for background 'dégradés sombres' (e.g. bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-purple-900/40 via-black to-black).
Use Framer Motion for EVERY route transition and component mount to hit the 'ultra-fluide' requirement.
For the dashboard/admin page, switch to a dense grid layout (Control Room Grid) but maintain the dark neo-brutalist/glass aesthetic.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override them to match the glassmorphism and neo-brutalist rules provided.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk. Use Unbounded for Headings and Outfit for body.
Ensure the P2P transfer screens use the provided avatars to demonstrate the flow.
